overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person perspective walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night, transitioning to driving a green sports car through urban streets, and concluding with a walk through a dimly lit underpass. The atmosphere is dense with holographic advertisements, Japanese signage, and cyberpunk aesthetics.

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway observing the neon-lit intersection below

entered.detail: red neon hotel sign glowing against the dark building facade
tall vertical digital billboard displaying japanese characters in pink neon
yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk visible on street below
green metal safety railings along the elevated walkway edge
large concrete support pillars for the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking a rain-soaked cyberpunk intersection. Neon signs and holographic billboards illuminate the scene with pink and teal light, while yellow crosswalk markings reflect on the wet street below. The camera moves steadily forward along the concrete walkway, passing green metal railings and concrete pillars.

events.description: passing a seated pedestrian resting on a concrete bench

agents.ego_description: walking along covered sidewalk beneath an awning with red paper lanterns

entered.detail: traditional red paper lanterns hanging in a row under the awning
long concrete seating benches along the left side of the walkway
large purple neon sign reading EL GUAPO on building facade
overhead translucent awning providing shelter from rain

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a covered pedestrian walkway adorned with traditional red paper lanterns hanging overhead. Concrete benches line the left side where a pedestrian sits resting. The EL GUAPO billboard glows purple in the distance, and the translucent awning overhead provides shelter from the light rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with crosswalk approaching green vehicle

events.description: descending from sidewalk to street level and stepping onto crosswalk
approaching and entering the green sports car with japanese text decals

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk and approaching the parked green sports car

entered.detail: sleek green sports car with white japanese characters and red interior
ground floor commercial storefronts with illuminated windows
wet asphalt road surface with yellow zebra crossing stripes

segments.scene_description: Descending to street level, the camera crosses the wet asphalt crosswalk with bright yellow stripes. A distinctive green sports car with Japanese text decals is parked ahead. The scene is open to the rain with street-level shops visible on the left, and the camera approaches and enters the vehicle.

events.description: accelerating onto the multi-lane city street from the intersection
turning corner and approaching the underpass entrance

agents.ego_description: driving the green sports car through wet city streets with neon reflections

notable_agents.action: other vehicle ahead driving in the same direction

entered.detail: wet asphalt road reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
dark concrete underpass entrance approaching ahead

segments.scene_description: Now driving from a first-person vehicle perspective, the camera navigates the green sports car through rain-slicked city streets. Neon billboards and building lights reflect off the wet asphalt. The car accelerates through the intersection, passes other vehicles, and approaches a dark concrete underpass entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit pedestrian underpass with debris

events.description: exiting vehicle and entering the covered pedestrian underpass
passing cardboard debris and discarded items on the underpass floor

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow underpass with metal railings on the right side

entered.detail: rough concrete walls of the narrow pedestrian underpass
discarded cardboard boxes and trash scattered on the ground
illuminated vending machine or terminal with bright screen
orange metal safety railings along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Having exited the vehicle, the camera proceeds on foot through a narrow, dimly lit pedestrian underpass. The concrete walls are close on the left, with orange metal railings on the right. Cardboard debris and discarded items litter the ground. A vending machine with a bright screen stands on the right, while distant neon signs glow at the underpass exit ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated urban vantage point down to the rain-slicked street level where a vehicle awaits. It begins on a concrete pedestrian walkway overlooking a neon-lit intersection, moving forward past green railings while pink and teal holographic billboards reflect off the wet pavement below. As the camera progresses, the open air shifts into a covered walkway sheltered by a translucent awning and adorned with glowing red paper lanterns. The scene then descends from the walkway to the street level, crossing bright yellow asphalt stripes amidst the falling rain and surrounding shops. Finally, the camera approaches a green sports car detailed with Japanese decals before smoothly entering the vehicle.

The shot follows a continuous transition from a high-speed drive through a neon-lit metropolis to a slow, solitary walk through a gritty urban underpass. It begins from the first-person perspective of a green sports car navigating rain-slicked streets, where vibrant billboards and city lights reflect off the wet asphalt. As the vehicle accelerates through a busy intersection and passes other cars, the environment narrows and darkens upon approaching a concrete tunnel entrance. The scene then shifts to a pedestrian perspective, moving on foot through a dimly lit underpass flanked by close concrete walls and orange metal railings. The camera glides past cardboard debris and a glowing vending machine before finally heading toward the distant neon signs shimmering at the exit.
